Label: Holding
Comments: This pose has 2 sets of layers.  Holding and Holding Arms
Name: Holding

Label: Shirt with Suspenders
Comments:
Distracting shading on top left collar, collars may be slightly too spiny. Rec. slight adjustments to shading and shaping. 

On the whole, excellent. Love this one
Name: Shirt with Suspenders

Label: Purple Tank
Comments: Excess edges where bottom seams meet. Also recommend shading rework
Name: Purple Tank

Label: Grey T-Shirt
Comments:
Exclusion same for both color variations. Rec. improved shading to decrease perceived ‘flatness’ along median vertical highlight. 

Line on right side (armpit area) too straight, visually distracting contrasted with left side. Rec. slight angle for a more natural look.

Slight but distracting overhang on lower left side, at least with certain parts (pictured with short skirt in screenshot) 

‘Pocket shirt’ suffers from nearly all the same criticisms here minus the excessive highlight
Name: Grey T-Shirt

Label: Layered Shirts
Comments:
Similar to ‘Short Sleeve’, right armpit seam line seems too straight, and there is a slight offset noticeable at the lower left seam between shirt and pants. 

Bottom seam between shirt layers too straight. 

While in theory I like the idea of a different gray tone on the left side of the long sleeves, in practice the ‘bright’ tone may look better if it were to match that of the right side.
Name: Layered Shirts

Label: Classic Eyelashes
Rules for Devs: See rules for Eyelashes on HairStyles - Separate Files for Left / Right
Name: Classic Eyelashes

Label: Exclusive UWU Cute
Comments: Potential Exclusive - Was Created for a Fanart Contest
Name: Exclusive UWU Cute

Label: Long Sleeve
Comments: Visually distracting edge on top shading. Rec. Smoother transition and slight rework of curvature
Name: Long Sleeve
